top_signals.title: Fujikura Shares Plunge After Three-Year Forecast Dents AI Hope
top_signals.summary: Fujikura Ltd. shares fell as much as 17% after its three-year forecast fell short of frothy expectations about artificial intelligence’s appetite for high-density optical-fiber networks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO Adds Second Musk Stock. Tesla Has a Problem
top_signals.summary: For years, there was only one way for mom-and-pop investors to buy into Elon Musk’s vision: shares of Tesla Inc. That’s about to change — and it’s a serious risk for Tesla investors.
